chrome.mechanism: multi-cycle sin tone curve plus pow(v, 8) rim highlight amplifies translator-level rounding

craquelure.mechanism: Voronoi F1/F2 nearest-rank tie feeds the smoothstep crack ridge

oilPaint_dryBrush.mechanism: eight-sector Kuwahara lowest-variance selection is discontinuous at sector ties

photocopy.mechanism: Gaussian-derived luminance crosses the narrow smoothstep tonal-ink threshold

plasticWrap.mechanism: high-exponent Blinn specular pow amplifies height-gradient rounding

plasticWrap_directed.mechanism: high-exponent Blinn specular pow amplifies height-gradient rounding with a non-axis-aligned light vector

pondRipples_aroundCenter.mechanism: sin-based radial displacement lands on a texture-coordinate boundary

relief.mechanism: Gaussian height gradient followed by squared glossy shading amplifies rounding

relief_basRelief.mechanism: Gaussian height gradient followed by squared glossy shading amplifies rounding at the explicit light angle

relief_notePaper.mechanism: binary step at the note-paper height threshold flips sparse contour pixels

relief_plaster.mechanism: smoothed height gradient followed by pow(shade, 2) amplifies rounding

stamp.mechanism: fwidth-derived antialias width shifts the smoothstep ink contour

unsharpMask.mechanism: separable Gaussian residual is amplified by subtract-and-rescale sharpening
